account.signOutConfirmMessage: You will need to sign in again to access tickets.
account.signOutFailedMessage: Unable to sign out. Please try again.

security.biometricNotSetUp: Biometrics are not set up on this device.

notifications.pushHint: Receive alerts when tickets are assigned, commented on, or updated.
notifications.permissionDeniedMessage: Enable notifications in your device settings to receive ticket alerts.

data.clearCacheConfirmMessage: This clears in-memory ticket caches on this device. You may need to refresh tickets after.

accountDelete.title: Delete Account
accountDelete.body: Deleting your account removes your user from Alga PSA. If you're on a Solo plan, your account and all its data — clients, tickets, invoices, time entries — will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
accountDelete.appleNote: Note: deleting your account here does NOT automatically cancel your Apple subscription. To stop future charges, open Settings on your iPhone → your name → Subscriptions → Alga PSA → Cancel Subscription.
accountDelete.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete your user account. If you're on a Solo plan, your account and all its data will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
accountDelete.cancelInstructions: To stop future Apple charges, open Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions and cancel Alga PSA.

errors.failed: Unable to delete your account. Please try again.
errors.notSignedIn: You must be signed in to delete your account.
